name: Barbecued Pork (Texas-style!)
recipeIngredient: leftover Pork Roast with Gravy - cooked as directed
recipeInstructions:
1. After cooking the Pork Roast with Gravy in a crock pot as directed, return the pork leftovers to the crock pot.
2. Add the tomatoes, tomato sauce, tomato paste, garlic, brown sugar, vinegar, and chopped onions.
3. Cook on Low for 12 to 18 hours (overnight).
4. Crush the meat into strings; remove any pork bones from the barbecue.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Cool the barbecue and remove excess fat.
7. To freeze: place the barbecue in freezer containers, cover, and freeze. Bundle with 3 large hamburger buns per container.
8. To prepare: thaw the barbecue before heating.
9. Place the barbecue in a saucepan and heat until hot.
10. Toast the buns; place the barbecue over the buns and serve with a fork. It's juicy!
Serving Ideas: Potato salad or coleslaw
Notes: Makes 2 entrees.
